note: This EPD does not use standard EN 15804 modules (A1-A3 etc.). Instead it reports results by Upstream, Core and Downstream modules covering a cradle-to-grave system. No A1-A3 production-stage column exists, so A1-A3 GWP values cannot be extracted directly. For reference, the full cradle-to-grave TOTALs per 1 kg are: GWP-fossil 1.05 kg CO2 eq., GWP-biogenic -0.151, GWP land use 0.0876, GWP-total 0.986, and GWP-GHG 1.66 kg CO2 eq. (Upstream-only: fossil 0.833, biogenic -0.151, total 0.770, GWP-GHG 1.43). The declared unit is '1 kg of product, including packaging'.
